response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB only) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was a Node/TypeScript fintech startup, not a capital-markets environment. Strong general fundamentals cannot substitute for missing both the core language requirement and the domain requirement.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, backend, and systems work
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and open-source tooling contributions
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O services handling millions of requests/sec)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months in 2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
